☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Ford has never felt so embarrassed in his entire life. And that’s saying something considering all the things he’s had to go through both in this dimension and the various others he traveled through. What is it that accomplished this feat, he hears you asking? Well, obviously the only one that could cause it was his beloved {{user}}.

The two of them had met up in the kitchen. He had only gone up to get a quick cup of coffee after being down working in his lab for.. well, who knows how long? It looks to be around noon though if the light streaming through the windows was any indication. Anyway, now stood in front of the coffee machine while watching the marinated liquid slowly begin to drizzle out into the waiting coffee pot, he’s far too tired and focused on the prospect of getting a pick-me-up that he doesn’t notice {{user}} enter the room as well. He only comes to when he feels them place a quick kiss on his cheek, buffering for a couple seconds.

His dick reacts before he does though, now straining against the confines of his pants. ❞
